---
name: Modify an existing indicator
about: Propose changes to an indicator's criteria, evidence sources, or citations
title: "[Modify indicator] NDI-xxxxxx — "
labels: modify-indicator
assignees: ''
---

## Indicator

**Concept ID:** `NDI-xxxxxx`
**Current version:** `NDI-xxxxxx-vN`
**Title:**

## What change are you proposing?

- [ ] Modify inferred criteria
- [ ] Modify declared criteria
- [ ] Modify validated criteria
- [ ] Add or remove evidence sources
- [ ] Add supporting citations
- [ ] Add dissenting citations
- [ ] Modify the indicator title or description
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Description of the change

<!-- What specifically should change, and what should it become? Quote the current text
     if you are proposing a rewording. -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why is this change needed? Has the current criteria proven difficult to apply?
     Is there new evidence? Is the criterion ambiguous or over-specified? -->

## Supporting evidence

<!-- Citations, examples, or links that support this change. -->

## Impact assessment

Does this change affect:

- [ ] How the indicator would be scored for organizations already evaluated against it
- [ ] The indicator's domain assignment in the taxonomy
- [ ] Any other indicators (cross-references, mitigates/reinforces relationships)

---

*If accepted, this change will result in a new indicator version (`vN+1`). The existing version remains in place for prior evaluations.*
